datapoints.description: Number of OSDs that are down
datapoints.name: osd_down_count

datapoints.description: Number of OSDs that are out of the cluster map
datapoints.name: osd_out_count

description: Rook-Ceph operator-level health summary including OSD and monitor status via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Operator-level health summary. ceph_status_healthy uses bool comparison (1 when health_status==0, 0 otherwise). osd_down_count and osd_out_count use count() which returns nothing when all OSDs are healthy, so vector(0) fallback is essential.
name: ODF_Rook_Operator_Health
